props.open_message: A small offering, tucked against the inside curve of the arch. Whoever passes is invited to take it. Most do not look down.

root.speaker: Threshold Stone
root.text: *A faint hum, like wind through stone…*

hint_pre.speaker: Threshold Stone
hint_pre.text: The Wyrdmark welcomes those who walk in Lirien's breath.

hint_post.speaker: Threshold Stone
hint_post.text: You walk far. The path remembers you.
